Package org.codehaus.plexus.lifecycle

Interface LifecycleHandler

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractLifecycleHandler, BasicLifecycleHandler

    • end

      void end(Object component, ComponentManager manager) throws PhaseExecutionException
      Deprecated.
      Parameters:
      component - The component.
      manager - The ComponentManager
      Throws:
      PhaseExecutionException - in case of an error.

    • end

      void end(Object component, ComponentManager manager, org.codehaus.plexus.classworlds.realm.ClassRealm componentContextRealm) throws PhaseExecutionException
      Parameters:
      component - The component.
      manager - The ComponentManager
      componentContextRealm - the realm used to create the component, which may not be the component's realm; this component could have requirements that were satisfied using components from this realm. It could be used to lookup the same manager components that were used to start the component.
      Throws:
      PhaseExecutionException - in case of an error.

    • initialize

      void initialize()
      initialize.
